name: Amazon Returnship
description: Amazon's returnship program for professionals who have been away from the workforce for 2+ years. Open to all tech and business functions.

name: Microsoft LEAP
description: Microsoft's apprenticeship program for individuals returning to the tech industry after a career break.

name: IBM Tech Re-Entry
description: IBM's returnship program offering paid projects and mentoring for professionals returning to tech after a career break.

name: Salesforce Returnship
description: Salesforce's return-to-work program with mentoring and hands-on experience in cloud technology.

name: Goldman Sachs Returnship
description: A program designed for experienced professionals returning to the workforce after a career break of 2+ years.

name: PayPal Recharge
description: PayPal's program for returning professionals, offering mentorship and career development support.

name: Google Career Certificates
description: Google's career certificate programs paired with job placement support for career returners.

name: Accenture Back to Work
description: Accenture's return-to-work program offering professional development and hands-on client experience.

name: Deloitte Encore
description: Deloitte's returnship program for experienced professionals looking to resume careers in professional services.

name: Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) Rebegin
description: TCS's program designed for women professionals returning to IT after a career break, offering reskilling and project experience.
